case_title: PHILIPP SCHOEBINGER VS. EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOEBINGER, PHILIPP
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOEBINGER, PHILIPP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00); SC-104 PROOF STAMPED: 'BY FAX' SERVED OCT-10-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SCHOEBINGER, PHILIPP AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHOEBINGER, PHILIPP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, L.L.C. $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,160.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF PHILIPP SCHOEBINGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MILAN KURUC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF SCHOEBINGER, PHILIPP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2024 - JUDGMENT.
